If you provide generative AI services to: If you provide generative AI services to the public in mainland China, you will fulfill legal obligations including filing, security assessment, content safety, complaint handling, generated content labeling, log retention, and personal information protection.

Please type the following text to confir: Please type the following text to confirm:
Redemption codes are disabled until the: Redemption codes are disabled until the administrator confirms compliance terms.
Referral reward transfer is disabled unt: Referral reward transfer is disabled until the administrator confirms compliance terms.
Register each URL into the matching Test: Register each URL into the matching Test Mode / Production Mode webhook slot in the Pancake dashboard. Separate endpoints prevent test traffic from accidentally crediting production accounts.
Start collecting payments globally witho: Start collecting payments globally without registering a company. Built for indie developers, OPC sole proprietorships, and startups. Waffo Pancake acts as your Merchant of Record, taking on the compliance burden of global payment collection — consumption tax, invoicing, subscription management, refunds, and chargebacks. Solo developers can launch fast and stay focused on product instead of compliance. Onboard in minutes — one prompt to a full integration.
Subscription plan creation and changes a: Subscription plan creation and changes are locked until the administrator confirms compliance terms in Payment Gateway settings.
Subscription plans do NOT use the bound: Subscription plans do NOT use the bound Product — each plan has its own dedicated Pancake product, set in the Subscriptions admin (or auto-minted via the "+ Create" button there).
The bound Product powers wallet top-ups:: The bound Product powers wallet top-ups: when a user enters any amount, new-api runs the checkout against this single Pancake product and overrides the price per session — no need to pre-create $1 / $5 / $10 SKUs.
The bound Store is the parent container: The bound Store is the parent container for every Pancake product new-api creates from this admin — both the wallet top-up product and any subscription-plan products. One store is enough; pin a different one only if you genuinely run separate Pancake catalogs.
The entered text does not match the requ: The entered text does not match the required text.
The environment (test vs production) is: The environment (test vs production) is decided by the key you paste here — use the Test key while integrating, then swap to the Production key when going live.
This confirmation unlocks payment, redem: This confirmation unlocks payment, redemption code, subscription plan, and invitation reward features. Please read the statements carefully.
Used as SuccessURL on the new product. Y: Used as SuccessURL on the new product. You'll be prompted to confirm if left blank.
